name: My Favorite Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until well combined.
2. Add the egg and beat thoroughly.
3. Sift together the flour, mixed ground spice, baking soda, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture with buttermilk, mixing well.
5. Mix in the small raisins (soaked and drained).
6. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a well-greased pan or cookie sheet.
7. Bake at 375°F until golden brown.
Note: The spices can be adjusted according to personal preference. Nuts may also be used instead of raisins.
